name: Kahua Construction Management API
what_it_does: Kahua REST API for construction project and program management platform designed for project owners and capital program managers. Enables AI agents to manage project portfolios and budgets, track contracts and change orders, handle procurement and cost management, access project schedule data, manage document workflows, integrate project data with ERP systems, and coordinate multi-project capital programs.
use_cases: Managing capital project portfolios and budgets from program management agents
Tracking contracts and change orders from project cost control agents
Integrating project data with ERP and accounting systems from capital project agents
Accessing project schedule and milestone status from program reporting agents
not_for: General contractors without owner/program management focus
Small renovation projects without capital program management complexity
Construction document management without cost and contract management
best_when: A corporate real estate team, public agency, or large owner managing capital construction programs wants AI agents to automate project budget tracking, contract management, cost reporting, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Capital project budgets and contract data involve significant financial commitments. Automated changes to contract values or budgets require appropriate authorization controls.

auth.notes: Kahua uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials. Partner program for integration developers. Built on a platform model — apps run within Kahua's architecture.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — capital project management enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts; pricing based on project portfolio size
pricing.notes: Atlanta-based company. Founded 2009. Owner-side construction management focus (vs general contractor tools). Capital programs, corporate real estate, and public agency customers. Platform model with extensible apps.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Capital project budgets and contracts involve significant financial commitments
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
No webhooks — requires polling for project data updates
Platform model — custom apps run within Kahua; understand app context vs API context
US data residency only — verify for international capital programs
Owner-side focus — API differs from general contractor platforms like Procore
agent_readiness.security_notes: Capital project financial and contract data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Owner-side capital program management.

security_score_components.security_notes: Capital project and contract data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Owner-side management platform.
